title: PR 102 · Partial request coverage
description: Core pagination works, but compatibility and migration coverage are incomplete.
request: Add cursor pagination to the meals API, preserve old clients, and document migration.

requirements.text: The meals API returns and accepts an opaque next cursor.
Clients that omit cursor parameters keep their previous behavior.
The API documentation explains migration for existing clients.

pull_request.title: Start meals pagination
pull_request.description: Adds the cursor implementation and a happy-path test. Migration notes are a draft.

artifacts.summary: The first-page and next-page cases pass; no legacy-client case exists.
Mentions pagination but does not explain migration.

recorded_assessments.rationale: The implementation and happy-path test cover cursor production and consumption.
The implementation may preserve defaults, but no regression test exercises an old client.
Pagination is mentioned, but concrete migration instructions are absent.
